sections_cited: Section 56 of the Specific Relief Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5936 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on Misc. No. 26369/2024 2. For orders on Misc. No.26370/20224 3. For hearing of main case 10.03.2025 Mr. Muhammad Nooruddin advocate holds brief for Mr. Allah Warayo Khan, advocate for the petitioner Present petition seeks a writ against Traffic Police restraining them from issuing traffic challan etc. Upon being confronted as to how such order can be issued interfering inter alia in the public duties of the official functionaries learned counsel remained unable to assist. The relief sought appears to offend Section 56 of the Specific Relief Act, 1877. Petition found to be misconceived is dismissed in limine along with pending applications. Judge Judge Amjad
